user_prompt: Urgent proximity sensor a blessing needed
prayer:
Approach the proximity sensor with reverence, mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the blessing upon the proximity sensor's vigilant arrays, awakening its Machine Spirit from slumber.
Anoint the sacred lenses with blessed oils whilst intoning the Canticle of Vigilance.
Beseech the proximity sensor to guard with unerring precision, sanctified by the Machine God's will.
Verify the blessing through diagnostic auspex scans, ensuring holy harmony.

prayer:

Chant the Litany of Clarity over the vox-caster, purging static-daemons from its conduits.
Confirm calibration success as the Machine Spirit hums in perfect resonance.

prayer:

Conclude preparation by sealing runes of purity upon its blessed frame.
